title: Crypto Exchange Backend
subheader: NestJS microservices architecture for a cryptocurrency exchange. Real-time order matching, CI/CD pipeline, WebSocket price feeds and migration from monolith to microservices — zero downtime during production cutover.

title: AI-Powered Shift Matching
subheader: Smart matching engine for a healthcare staffing platform with 150,000+ nurses. GCP Pub/Sub event pipeline, habit-tracking algorithm (EMA scoring), MongoDB geospatial queries — reduces manual scheduling from hours to seconds.

title: Blockchain & Web3 API
subheader: Backend service for interacting with Ethereum and BSC nodes. Smart contract deployment, wallet management, transaction signing and real-time event listeners — integrated with existing NestJS infrastructure via REST and WebSocket.

title: Utility Payment Processing
subheader: Real-time payment processing system for utility companies. Proprietary data exchange protocol, instant charge recalculation, multi-tenant architecture serving multiple municipalities — handles peak load of thousands of transactions per hour.

title: SaaS Bookkeeping Backend
subheader: T2125 form automation for Canadian freelancers (SoloBook). NestJS REST API, CRA-compliant tax calculation engine, PDF report generation and Stripe subscription billing — built from zero to production in 6 weeks.

title: Bank Terminal Software
subheader: Payment acceptance system deployed across bank branches and self-service terminals. Works on low-bandwidth connections, AES-encrypted data transmission and real-time sync with core banking — processing prepaid payments with sub-second confirmation.

title: Data collection from meters
subheader: Development of an electronic device for collecting information from electronic meters. Design of printed circuit boards. Setting up large-scale production.
